# Version 3.116.1
> **Android 16 KB alignment servicing** · Released December 5, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.1)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.1 is a servicing release that updates the Android NDK and fixes NuGet packaging. The native Android build moves to NDK r27c with 16 KB page-size alignment so SkiaSharp keeps loading on the next generation of Android devices. A packaging fix ensures the referenced assets land at the correct path inside the NuGet.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Platform

- **Android NDK r27c with 16 KB page alignment** — The libSkiaSharp shared library for Android is now built with NDK r27c and linked with 16 KB page-size alignment, which is required by Google Play for devices shipping 16 KB pages in Android 15+. ([#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))

## Bug Fixes

- **Correct PackagePath in the NuGet** — Restores the PackagePath attribute that was inadvertently dropped in 3.116.0, so referenced files are placed at the expected path inside consuming projects. ([#3102](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3102))
